GRN 1: Soy isoflavone extract

Closure Date: 1998-11-03

Notifier: Archer Daniels Midland Company

FDA Decision: At the notifier's request, FDA ceased to evaluate this notice

Algal oil ( 35% DHA) also will be used as an ingredient in cow milk-, goat milk-, soy-, amino acid-, and extensively hydrolyzed protein-based, non-exempt infant formula for term infants and exempt infant formula for pre-term and low birthweight infants, at a maximum level of 0.5% (w/w) of total fat as DHA in combination with a safe and suitable source of arachidonic acid (ARA) at a ratio ranging from 1:1 to 1:2 of DHA to ARA.

FDA Decision: At the notifier's request, FDA ceased to evaluate this notice (in PDF)

Original Text: Algal oil ( 35% docosahexaenoic acid) from Schizochytrium sp. FJRK-SCH3
